data.title: Paubox wins Best Email Encryption Software in 2026 by G2 Awards, second consecutive year, 100M+ buyers reached annually.
data.description: Paubox, a prominent provider of HIPAA compliant email security, received recognition as the top email encryption software in the 2026 Best Healthcare Software Products Awards by G2. This marks the second year in a row that Paubox has achieved this accolade, with the awards determined solely through verified user reviews. G2, the world's largest software marketplace catering to over 100 million buyers yearly, selected Paubox among the world's elite software products. This acknowledgement is particularly notable given that less than 1% of the 175,000+ software products reviewed received such recognition.

data.title: Stock market rebounds with S&P 500 hitting resistance, led by ASML, Micron, and Nvidia; Walmart earnings awaited.
data.description: The stock market showed gains with ASML, Micron, and Nvidia leading the way, resulting in a bounce. However, the S&P 500 encountered resistance. Walmart's earnings report is eagerly anticipated. Dow Jones Futures also saw a rise to resistance levels, with Nvidia and ASML leading the charge. Additionally, Carvana experienced a late dive, while Walmart's earnings report is expected.

data.title: Solana futures signal concerns as panicked bulls eye $80 SOL stability amid $78 support weakness and dwindling dApp revenues.
data.description: Solana is facing challenges due to a decline in dApp revenues as well as low interest from institutional and retail investors, heightening the vulnerability of SOL's support level at $78.

data.title: Kelly Caccetta retires as President and CEO of CSSI, LLC after 15 years. Chris Hegedus appointed as new President and CEO.
data.description: Washington-based company CSSI has announced the retirement of Kelly Caccetta as President and CEO after 15 years of service. Throughout her tenure, Kelly has been instrumental in establishing a culture of client success and operational integrity within CSSI and its partners. The CSSI Board, under the leadership of Proteus Enterprises, has appointed Chris Hegedus as the new President and CEO. Chris brings with him extensive experience and leadership qualities to continue driving CSSI's mission forward.
